title: BSP A733 store-clock completion comment audit
trigger: The BSP host struct has an A733-specific comment that clk_store ensures SDMMC successfully completes work together with MBUS matching.
bsp_evidence: BSP sunxi-mmc.h defines clk_store with the comment: on A733, ensure sdmmc successfully completed the work, applicable together with mbus matching.
BSP probe obtains mmc_store, mmc_mbus, and mmc_msi_lite clocks.
BSP enable path enables ahb, then clk_store, then clk_mbus, then clk_msi_lite, then the mmc module clock.
BSP A733 SDMMC0 DTS names mmc_store as CLK_STORE_AHB_GATE and mmc_mbus as CLK_MBUS_STORE_GATE.
local_evidence: The local diagnostic driver already has clk_mmc_store, clk_mmc_mbus, and clk_mmc_msi_lite members.
The local diagnostic probe gets optional mmc_store, mmc_mbus, and mmc_msi_lite clocks.
The local diagnostic enable path enables ahb, then mmc_store, then mmc_mbus, then mmc_msi_lite, then mmc.
The local A733 DTS wires mmc_store to CLK_AHB_STORE and mmc_mbus to CLK_MBUS_STORE.
Prior runtime evidence with these storage fabric clocks still reached IDMAC DESC_READ with CHDA=DLBA, CBDA=0, and descriptor OWN unchanged.

public_search.notes: Search still did not reveal a public archive hit or answer for the A733 SDMMC0 descriptor-fetch question.

reason: The A733-specific BSP store-clock comment identifies an important requirement, but the current diagnostic tree already implements that clock path and the stall persists. Retesting it would duplicate closed H013/H041/H046 storage-fabric evidence.
next: Do not reopen mmc_store/mmc_mbus/mmc_msi_lite as a standalone fix without new evidence that the CCU IDs or gates are wrong.
Continue waiting for a maintainer/list reply or a source-backed SDMMC0 firewall/security/master-permission bit.
